Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Unknown God]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Unknown God has tenets, such as Mercy for the undeserving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Andel praises the Unknown God.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Tombstone swore to the Unknown God of the Luminian Order.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Andel follows the teachings of the Unknown God.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius invokes the blessings of the Unknown God.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — An assassin was converted to the Unknown God.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — The Unknown God is a deity mentioned in Karson's thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Unknown God is a deity mentioned in thanks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Calder wonders if the Unknown God will take a prayer from him.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Unknown God is mentioned in a context regarding decisions about ruling the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Unknown God is a deity mentioned in relation to Calder Marten's true nature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — The Unknown God is a deity of the Luminians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli thanks the Unknown God for protecting the lantern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli sends a prayer to the Unknown God.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Darius prayed to the Unknown God for strength.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
